title: Kayabi
body:
## Kayabi Resource Pack

### 🔹 Ancient weapons.
It is a simple resource pack that replaces vanilla objects with new weapon models.

### 🔹 Replacements
| Vanilla Item | Model  |
|--------------|--------------|
| Netherite Sword| ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SdXAIjVQ/images/002715c26688a6ad4d5ebadf788ffcdf2c97aa85.png)|

### 🔹 Version
Pack format is for v1.21.4 but works with older versions.
- 1.21.4
- 1.20.6
- 1.19.4
- 1.18.2
